title: Insert a tar_target() skeleton — it
text: function intended quick interactive use. calls [insert_tar_target()] inserts `targets::tar_target()` skeleton current cursor position RStudio.

title: Insert a tar_target() skeleton — it
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # In RStudio, place the cursor in an R script and run: it()  # This is equivalent to: insert_tar_target() } # }
